tasks.subject: P4 Task 1: Theme core (lib/theme.ts) — resolver + script source
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure ThemeChoice, resolveDark, STORAGE_KEY, and THEME_SCRIPT (inline boot script source).

**Files:** lib/theme.ts, tests/unit/theme.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** resolveDark explicit + system cases; THEME_SCRIPT references storage key + classList.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/theme.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/theme.ts", "tests/unit/theme.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/theme.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolveDark explicit", "resolveDark system", "THEME_SCRIPT references storage+classList"]}
```

tasks.subject: P4 Task 2: Class-based dark tokens (app/globals.css)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move dark tokens from @media (prefers-color-scheme) to :root.dark; light default unchanged; @theme inline unchanged.

**Files:** app/globals.css

**Acceptance Criteria:** dark tokens under :root.dark; light default on :root; build succeeds; class flips palette.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dark tokens on :root.dark", "light default preserved", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: P4 Task 3: No-flash script injection (app/layout.tsx)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Inject THEME_SCRIPT in <head> so .dark is set before paint; keep suppressHydrationWarning.

**Files:** app/layout.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** script in <head> runs pre-body; suppressHydrationWarning retained; no hydration errors.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["script in head pre-paint", "suppressHydrationWarning kept", "no hydration errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: P4 Task 4: ThemeToggle control + e2e
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 3-way header control persisting choice to localStorage, applying class live, tracking OS while system.

**Files:** components/ThemeToggle.tsx, components/AppNav.tsx, tests/e2e/theme.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** light/dark/system updates localStorage + html.dark; persists across reload; system tracks OS live; sits in header.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/theme.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/ThemeToggle.tsx", "components/AppNav.tsx", "tests/e2e/theme.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/theme.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3-way updates storage+class", "persists across reload", "system tracks OS", "placed in header"]}
```
